programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Douglas Lima takes on Michael 'Venom' Page in the Semi-Final round of the Welterweight Grand Prix. In the Main Event, Featherweight Champion Patricio Pitbull moves up to challenge Michael Chandler for the Lightweight World Title.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA returns to Madison Square Garden as Welterweight Champ Rory MacDonald defends his belt against Neiman Gracie in the Welterweight Grand Prix. In the Co-Main Event MMA legends Lyoto Machida and Chael Sonnen square off in the Bellator cage.

programme.title: Bellator 224: Budd vs Rubin
programme.desc: The summer heats up when Bellator MMA Featherweight World Champion Julia Budd returns to the cage off 10 straight wins. Can her challenger the undefeated Olga “Big Bad” Rubin ice out Julia’s hot streak? Also, rising star Juliana Velasquez in action.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA returns to San Jose with a stacked card as the Featherweight Grand Prix kicks off with four of the opening round bouts. Then in the Main Event, Ryan Bader defends his Heavyweight belt against MMA legend Chieck Kongo

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA returns to Los Angeles with an epic night of fights as the Featherweight Grand Prix continues with four of the opening round bouts. Then in the Main Event a rematch between Lyoto Machida and former Middleweight Champion Gegard Mousasi.

programme.title: Bellator 229: Koreshkov vs Larkin
programme.desc: Russian “Spartan” Andrey Koreshkov returns in an anticipated welterweight match-up with hard-hitting Lorenz “The Monsoon” Larkin. Also, submission ace Goiti Yamauchi, Keri Taylor Melendez, and former kickboxing world champ Joe Schilling.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Heavyweight legends Frank Mir and Roy “Big Country” Nelson collide in a highly anticipated rematch from Mohegan Sun. While Phil “Mr. Wonderful” Davis, “Easy” Ed Ruth, “Rowdy” Bec Rawlings, and pro wrestler Jake Hager return to the cage.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA comes to the Mohegan Sun Arena with an explosive night of fights. The Bellator Welterweight Grand Prix concludes in the main event as current Champion Rory MacDonald takes on the former Champ Douglas Lima in a winner-takes-all bout.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA takes place from WinStar World Casino in Oklahoma as middleweight submission specialist John Salter meets Holland’s Costello van Steenis. And don’t miss former Strikeforce World Champion King Mo’s final fight as he takes on Andrew Kapel

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil unfolds an incredible story of Loretta,brutally raped at age 15, Dean, the man accused, the power of DNA, innocence, exoneration, and forgiveness. Pt.1

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: What's a woman to do when her spouse is constantly standing over her shoulder and nitpicking everything she does.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Don't miss Dr. Phil receiving his star on the Hollywood Walk of Fame! Plus, time is of the essence for mom Cindy. Daughter Cheyenne, 24, is a college student, Cindy's caretaker & sole financial supporter. Boyfriend, Blake, calls Cheyenne 'Cinderella'.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Kristen says two years ago she was manipulated into placing her newborn for adoption with her ex-stepfather Adam and his new wife, Stacy, who Kristen says promised she could remain in the child's life. Adam & Stacy insist they did everything by the book.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil spoke with Karen & Jim desperate to remove their mooching son from their home. Kyle revealed why his parents were at fault for his financial situation. Dr. Phil enlists the help of TVs "Bar Rescue", Jon Taffer, with advice for Kyle. Pt. 2

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Ivey, 21, admits the only "job" she's ever had has been working as an escort meeting clients in hotels until she can afford a stable home for her & her young son. Mom Faith found out & threw her out of the home. Friend Olivia goes between mom & daughter.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil's guests engage in a heated debate about the rights of men and women when a child is conceived out of wedlock. Should the biological father be forced to pay child support for a child he didn't know existed or did not plan?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Baylen bravely posted TikTok videos of her daily struggles with Tourette syndrome and now has over 3 million followers. Singer/Influencer Lele Pons says she also suffers from OCD, Tourette syndrome, & depression. They discuss their experiences.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Shaela went from being a mom to two with a master's degree working as a school counselor to being unemployed & living in an RV. Mom Sandra says Shaela has exhibited strange behaviors, including trimming bushes & pulling weeds in the middle of the night.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Mary says husband Jesse is abusive, unfaithful, controlling & she feels she's living in a prison. Jesse says he's not controlling, he's just "containing the beast," & his wife needs to abide by his rules if she wants to stay married. Dr. Sophy steps in.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Jason & Shady have a blended family on the verge of falling apart. After knowing each other 2 months & meeting in person 1 time, they married. Each brought children into their new home & with seven kids under one roof, life isn't what anyone expected.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: There have been no answers to the whereabouts of Summer Wells, 5, missing since 2021. Parents Don & Candus say it backfired by requesting the public's help. In this exclusive first national TV interview, Dr. Phil digs deeper into the story.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Continuing with Danielle & Brandon, who are involved in a custody battle. Accusations involving the Sheriff over a sports drink & CPS sent to a wedding rehearsal dinner--Dr. Phil tells the parents how to create a peaceful environment for their child.Pt.2

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil had asked Ted Williams the hard questions about sobriety & avoiding the pitfalls of sudden success. After an emotional family reunion for Ted & several family members abandoned by him more than 20 years ago. Ted is next confronted with rehab.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mr. Drysdale panics when Mrs. Drysdale comes back from Boston early because she'll meet the Clampetts.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny wants to go home because folks are so unfriendly no one has come to call.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mr. Drysdale talks Jed into taking in his butler and upstairs girl in a plan to civilize the Clampetts, but they don't quite understand the idea of servants.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mr. Drysdale convinces his self-absorbed stepson Sonny to date Elly May to Mrs. Drysdale's consternation, while Granny and Jed make preparations for Thanksgiving

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Sonny Drysdale decides he needs to be Pygmalion to Elly's Galatea and remake her from a hillbilly into a woman of society, while Granny uses love charms to heat up their relationship.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny and the rest of the Clampetts start a feud with the Drysdales since Sonny courted Elly May and then stood her up when granny suggested marriage.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jed, Ellie May, Jethro, and Granny take their first plane flight back home for Christmas to visit cousin Pearl, who is busy cooking up a feast to win Mr. Brewster's unwilling heart.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Back home for Christmas, Elly May bonds with her old animal friends, while Pearl plays the piano for the "new" movie in town (the silent version of Ben Hur) to impress Mr. Brewster.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Since Mr. Brewster doesn't want to get married, but since the whole county knows that Cousin Pearl had her hat set for him, Jed comes up with a plan for her to save face by having Mr. Brewster proposed in public and then have her turn him down

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts pack up to return to Beverly Hills, so Jethrine tries to pack Jazzbo Depew. Elly says goodbye to her animals

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Grannie and Cousin Pearl are at each other's throats over who's going to take care of the cooking and the house, so Jed has to find ways to keep them apart.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mrs. Drysdale leaves for a health farm saying Mr. Drysdale is "going to have a new wife," while Mr. Drysdale tells Cousin Pearl he'd like her to keep his house.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: When Pearl starts selling music lessons, Mrs. Drysdale complains about the noise to the police.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny can't stand Pearl's yodeling so she reports her to the police

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jed and Duke his dog are both down without a woman in their lives until they see and pursue a French woman and her poodle that she brought to breed with Mrs. Drysdale's dog.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mrs. Drysdale wants to get rid of the Clampett's before the arrival of Mrs. Smith-Standish, the head of a 'first family' historical society

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Henry Jones shows up at the Clampett's, pretends to be an old friend and tries to sell the family the Hollywood Bowl, Griffith Park, and the freeway.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Drysdale hires Jed to be a banker when he needs a crack shot to help beat a rival banker in a skeet shooting competition, but his partner needs to be an employee.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mrs. Drysdale continues to be forced into doing "practices from the past" by Mrs. Smith-Standish

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Miss Hathaway's brilliant-but-frumpy bank protegee Gloria is really a sultry gold-digger with eyes for Jed's $34 million

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: When an IRS agent gets chased away by Granny, Mr. Drysdale tells him the story of how the Clampetts came to be rich and move to Beverly Hills.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: When a couple who ran into the Clampett's car discover that they're rich, they fake injuries and sue the Clampetts.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro needs a health certificate to graduate from the fifth grade, so he goes to the only doctor the Clampetts know about - Mrs. Drysdale's psychiatrist

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro finally gets his bill of health from Dr. Twombly so he can graduate the fifth grade, but Twombly really wants to talk to Grannie again

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: When Miss Hathaway gets sick and Mr. Drysdale has to speak at a conference, Jed helps out by running the bank and having Elly be his secretary

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro brings home a friend, Armstrong Dueser McHugh III, who is coddled by a chauffeur who treats him as frail.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jed cheers up Granny by pretending to be sick so she can doctor him

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: Joan's daughter Lily comes to town to serve as maid of honor, and seduces best man Brandon. David tries to get another video contract after being dropped by MZA. Valerie sees Kenny having lunch with his family.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: Kelly helps Jimmy treat a bleeding cut, and panics after getting some blood on her hand. David refuses to tell his father that he has dropped out of school. Brandon and Mark hire a confident young woman as their news anchor.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: David and Mark throw a big party at their house. Clare catches Steve kissing another girl. Valerie comes clean with Brandon about her affair with Kenny.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: Kenny orders Valerie to terminate her pregnancy. Steve is miffed when Clare chooses to go to the Halloween concert with egotistical Dick Harrison. Brandon and Tracy spend time together at the club.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: Steve overhears Val discussing her pregnancy on the phone. David's grandfather leaves him $250,000 and a 1961 Thunderbird. An uncomfortable Tracy decides to quit her TV job after Brandon nixes a relationship.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: Brandon goes to see Kenny, who portrays himself as an innocent victim caught on the web of an evil vixen. Mel, worried by David's newfound wealth, asks Donna to keep an eye on him. Steve impresses Clare with his dedication as he trains for the crew race.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: During must see a psychiatrist after displaying hostile behavior. Mel agrees with the doctor's recommendation that David be held 72 hours for observation. Steve faces plagiarism charges. The gang helps Willie build a house.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: Steve elects to plead guilty, leaving his punishment to the lenient Chancellor Arnold. Brandon refuses to plead guilty to a crime he did not commit, and faces a hearing and possible expulsion. Felice objects to Donna's renewed relationship with David.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: Donna believes she has solved the mystery of her stalker's identity when she sees Garrett Slan, the man who tried to rape her, at the university.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: Donna's request for a permanent restraining order against Slan is denied. Tracy accidentally tells Brandon that she loves him. Steve and Clare consider living together as they spend a weekend house sitting. David takes an interest in a young singer.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: Donna's stalker confesses and holds the entire staff of the TV station hostage.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: Brandon and Kelly each confess their feelings to friends, but expect the other person to make a move. Donna tries to reconcile with David. Steve and Clare double date with Ryan and his girlfriend.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: Donna and David visit her grandmother in San Luis Obispo. Noting a striking resemblance between David and her late husband, Mrs. Martin tells the couple about her romance with Donna's grandfather.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: Joey returns to the beach apartment. Rob irritates his manager by seeking Val's advice about whether to sign on for a new movie. Jim and Cindy invite Brandon to spend spring vacation in Hong Kong.

programme.title: Beyond the Gates
programme.desc: Eva stands her ground with Kat. Hayley has a life-changing surprise to show Bill. Allison is in need of medical attention.

programme.title: Beyond the Gates
programme.desc: Leslie uses her injury to further her agenda. Jacob questions a family member about a police matter. Madison thinks Chelsea is getting played.

programme.title: Beyond the Gates
programme.desc: Vernon comes clean to Naomi. Nicole confronts Bill about how he's hurt Martin. Kat is unnerved by what she walks in on.

programme.title: Beyond the Gates
programme.desc: Pamela has an intriguing offer for Dani. Hayley wonders if her husband is in deep trouble. Tyrell and Samantha feel lied to by their entire family.

programme.title: Beyond the Gates
programme.desc: Kat admits to Chelsea that she is hiding something from Tomas, Leslie asks an irate Ted for a favor, and Naomi meets up with a woman named Regina who may have the answers she seeks.

programme.title: Beyond the Gates
programme.desc: Andre takes Ashley on a trip, June confronts someone from her past, and Vanessa struggles to keep the peace between Joey and Doug.

programme.title: Beyond the Gates
programme.desc: Martin needs Nicole's help in order to save his marriage, Vernon does his best to assuage Anita's fears, and a shocked Dani gives her daughter some tough advice.

programme.title: Beyond the Gates
programme.desc: Anita locks horns with Sharon and Tracy before their big day, the Dupree sisters scheme for the greater good, and Vernon and Tyrell have a heart to heart.

programme.title: Beyond the Gates
programme.desc: Derek is painfully honest with Ashley, and The Duprees get ready for The Articulettes' Reunion Concert, while Hayley tries to convince Bill to let go of his attachment to his former family.

programme.title: Beyond the Gates
programme.desc: Anita surprises her fans with a major revelation. Samantha tries to broker peace between Martin and Smitty. Nicole lays into Leslie for crashing the concert.

programme.title: Beyond the Gates
programme.desc: Ted confronts Doug about his latest misstep. Jan gives her daughter some much-needed advice. Meanwhile, Vanessa's extra cashflow draws some unwanted attention.

programme.title: Beyond the Gates
programme.desc: Hayley calls in a mysterious favor. Pamela puts Dani on the spot. Naomi clashes with Bill over his involvement with Joey.

programme.title: Beyond the Gates
programme.desc: Dani rushes into action during an emergency. Naomi gets some troubling info from Ashley. Elon makes a decisive move in the Stance Park murder investigation.

programme.title: Beyond the Gates
programme.desc: Hayley shares news with Bill that affects their future. Doug recruits Randy for a scheme of his own. Andre's ready to discuss matters of the heart, while Ashley has a tense talk with Derek.

programme.title: Beyond the Gates
programme.desc: Series Premiere: The holiday season is upon us and in the spirit of scandals, backstabbing, grudges and family drama, CBS brings you the first look at the new scintillating daytime series Beyond the Gates.

programme.title: Beyond the Gates
programme.desc: The Duprees, a powerful and prestigious multi-generational family that is the very definition of Black royalty, live, love, work and play in a leafy Maryland suburb just outside of Washington D.C.

programme.title: Saints & Sinners
programme.desc: Malik's murder rocks Cypress; Ella fights to clear her name and key players vie for power.

programme.title: Saints & Sinners
programme.desc: A family secret sets Ella on a new course, but forces Lady Byrd to take matters into her own hands.

programme.title: Mind Your Business
programme.desc: Alfonso and Aaliyah's world is flipped upside down when their mother's secret love child comes into town, while Mia tries to figure out who is sending her gifts every hour on the hour.

programme.title: Shahs of Sunset
programme.desc: After a night of romance, Mike and Jessica discuss how to go about repairing their relationship; MJ confides in Asa that Tommy has moved out; Shervin accosts GG about the rumors concerning her illness at Asa's debut fashion show for Asa Kaftans.

programme.title: Shahs of Sunset
programme.desc: Reza plans a group trip to Belize in an effort to save Mike and Jessica's marriage; as the group touches down in the jungle, Mike waits nervously for his wife to arrive; MJ contemplates life without Tommy; GG's resentments spill over during dinner.

programme.title: Shahs of Sunset
programme.desc: Mike escapes his marital problems by going sightseeing in the Belizean rainforest with Shervin, Nima and GG; a visitor surprises the group; Reza confronts Mike with newfound proof about his marriage, forcing Mike to reveal a dark secret.

programme.title: Shahs of Sunset
programme.desc: While exploring Mayan ruins, an altercation between Reza and GG threatens to destroy the trip; Mike asks Asa for help winning his wife back; GG embarks on a drastic new health regimen that shocks her inner circle; Reza returns to the comedy stage.

programme.title: Shahs of Sunset
programme.desc: Reza and MJ make an unpleasant discovery about Jessica; Shervin tries to convince GG to patch things up with Reza; the group rallies together at Mike's shoe launch in Beverly Hills.

programme.title: Shahs of Sunset
programme.desc: MJ struggles to let go of old belongings; Mike poses for Asa's art show photos; Reza and Adam make their marriage official; MJ plans a "rebirth" ceremony at the Hollywood Forever Cemetery.

programme.title: Shahs of Sunset
programme.desc: MJ decides to marry Tommy; Reza and Adam discuss having children; Mike decides to move forward without Jessica; old wounds reopen at the unveiling of Asa's photography project; Reza and GG reach a point of no return.

programme.title: Shahs of Sunset
programme.desc: Golneza and Reza pick up their relationship where it left off; Asa and Mercedes butt heads; Mike opens up about his pending divorce from Jessica; Mama Vida Javid expresses brutally honest opinions about her daughter's tight-knit circle.

programme.title: Shahs of Sunset
programme.desc: Asa is chastised for refusing to share her "real" life on camera; Golnesa faces difficult truths about her rheumatoid arthritis; a heartbreaking meltdown leads to an unexpected moment.

programme.title: Shahs of Sunset
programme.desc: MJ and Tommy butt heads with a neighbor; Asa reveals her "miracle" pregnancy to Reza; former "train wreck" GG practices Zen; Mike hosts a housewarming party; Asa's announcement forces MJ and Reza to face a crossroads in their own lives.

programme.title: Shahs of Sunset
programme.desc: Reza and Adam throw an anniversary celebration, during which Shervin reveals he is an exclusive relationship with Annalise; Shervin hosts a party and invites Reza and GG; GG apologizes to Adam while avoiding Reza; MJ and Reza visit her father.

programme.title: Shahs of Sunset
programme.desc: A planned trip to Israel causes a rift; Reza throws a Peace in the Middle East costume party to bring about harmony; GG tries responsibility on for size during LA Fashion Week; MJ and Tommy decide to take the next step toward becoming parents.

programme.title: Shahs of Sunset
programme.desc: Reza and Adam explore both surrogacy and adoption; GG introduces her Jewish boyfriend to her Muslim parents; the Shahs are excited about their trip to Israel; after a wild night out, MJ's friends wonder whether she's ready to be a mother.

programme.title: Shahs of Sunset
programme.desc: Asa plans a trip to the ancient Israeli city of Akko to shoot a documentary, but her plan backfires as religious tension between Mike and GG comes to a head; during an emotional trip to the Western Wall, Reza attempts to tap into his Jewish side.

programme.title: Shahs of Sunset
programme.desc: During their journey towards enlightenment in Israel, drama erupts when Asa drops a bombshell during a group lunch at the Dead Sea; GG makes a decision that involves her boyfriend, Shalom; Asa reveals the gender of her baby during a group dinner.

programme.title: Shahs of Sunset
programme.desc: Asa begins to feel more isolated from the crew; Mike decides it's time to move forward with his love life; MJ hears some gossip about Shervin; GG's roller-skating party turns into an interrogation as Shervin confronts the rumors about him.

programme.title: Shahs of Sunset
programme.desc: As Reza and Adam find out if their swimmers are strong enough to produce a little Farahan of their own, MJ continues to question how Asa became pregnant; Mike pushes forward with his baby shoe venture; Asa screens the video she filmed in Israel.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Cuando aparece un video de policías siendo acosados por un grupo de personas en un complejo residencial, Frank ordena una redada para arrestar a cualquiera con una orden pendiente.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Cuando aparece un video de oficiales participando en un claro caso de trampa, Frank se centra en encontrar al policía que filtró el video.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando una niña de 4 años de edad, se pierde durante su estancia con un familiar en Mississippi, el UAC descubre algunas verdades sorprendentes como las carreras de equipo para encontrar a la niña y llevarla a un lugar seguro.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando unos cuerpos ahogados misteriosamente son descubiertos en el desierto de Las Vegas, el UAC trata de averiguar la verdadera causa y el motivo de los asesinatos.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando se encuentran tres cuerpos con marcas de mordeduras de animales y humanos en una tumba poco profunda cerca de Milwaukee, la UAC tiene preguntas desconcertantes que responder.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: A medida que el UAC concluye una investigación sobre apuñalamientos inusuales en el estado de Nueva York, la visita de Morgan a un sobreviviente podría descubrir más preguntas que quedan para que el equipo responda.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Cuando Ducky determina que uno de sus cuerpos de investigación ha sido víctima de un asesinato, el equipo del NCIS descubre una red de intrigas criminales.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El suicidio se convierte en homicidio mientras el equipo del NCIS trata de convencer a un oficial de la marina de no saltar a la muerte.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers pursue a man who attempted to cash a bad check then fled the scene. Police are called when a man’s ex-girlfriend breaks into his house. Police chase an unlicensed teen speeding in a vehicle

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A car pursuit turned foot chase ends with the suspect jumping head first into a creek-bed. Officers catch up to a man trying to flee the scene after assaulting his wife. Officers stop a suspicious vehicle driving with no headlights.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers apprehend a man in possession of stolen property brandishing a rifle. Officers respond to a call of brothers in a fist fight. Police intervene when a couple argues in the middle of the street.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers detect a strong odor of marijuana during a routine traffic stop. A woman tells officers her inebriated boyfriend smashed a window. Police investigate a suspicious vehicle parked behind a cemetery.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers engage in a highspeed pursuit of a stolen vehicle. Police contact the Fire Department and alert the guests when they spot a motel fire. Officers pursue a suspect on a stolen motorcycle.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Suspects lead officers on a reckless car chase on residential streets. Police tend to a woman assaulted by her inebriated friend. A DWI suspect is found relieving himself in a public port-a-potty.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A traffic stop becomes dangerous when the suspect takes off on the interstate. Officers find a large bag of drugs in a man’s pants. Officers respond to a dispute at a familiar location.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers arrest a suspect hoarding drugs inside a motel room. A driver admits to drug and alcohol use after being pulled over. Officers assist in the search for a runaway child.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man runs from police over a parole violation. Officers respond when a trouble maker is expelled from a bar for bad behavior. Police pursue a man after he bails from his car during a traffic stop.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers pursue two suspects fleeing from a stolen vehicle. A drunk driver is pulled over after a brief chase. Officers receive a call for help from a juvenile about an attempted break-in.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers spot a suspected stolen vehicle and a pursuit ensues. Officers are called to a fight at a bar over a tossed drink. Police are called to the scene of two intoxicated siblings arguing.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers give chase to a suspect driving a stolen vehicle. A biohazard bin an illegal knife and drugs are found during a traffic stop. Agents go undercover in an area known for heavy drug activity.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man involved in a drug deal claims he works for the task force. An irate woman slams the front door when officers arrive. Police pull over two young suspects in an area known for drug activity.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Multiple units pursue a stolen vehicle on the run. A woman tells officers her intoxicated boyfriend destroyed her mailbox then fled. A loaded shotgun is found in a vehicle after a brief pursuit.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A DUI suspect with a suspended license claims he’s not drunk. Officers track an armed robber. An armed and dangerous suspect hides from officers in an apartment complex.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers are called to a burglary at a warehouse housing expensive items. Police are called to the scene of a threatening man with a knife. Officers thwart an attempted suicide during a traffic stop.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers engage in a bizarre slow-speed chase after a suspect’s failure to stop. A woman is pulled over after leaving a known drug house. An officer pursues two illegal drag racers on a public highway.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers are assaulted by the brother of a suspect who is resisting arrest. A resident sprays water on his neighbor’s noisy dogs. Officers recover drugs and cash after pulling over a motorist.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers search for suspects stealing rims at a car dealership. A married couple claim drugs found in their car were from a nearby ditch. Officers detain an inebriated man arguing with a store clerk.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Deputies assist an injured woman who vows revenge on her male attackers. A woman tells deputies her husband beat her in front of their children. Officers protect an elderly woman from an abusive child.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An out-of-control woman needs to be subdued after an arrest. Deputies spot an erratic driver who appears to be under the influence. A car is seen being driven backwards on a one-way street.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police pursue a driver who ran a stop sign. A suspect wearing a D.A.R.E. T-shirt is found to be in possession of drugs. A woman claims the drugs found in the vehicle she’s sleeping in are not hers.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers respond to a call of a naked man inside a school. A woman being questioned by police is oblivious to her wardrobe malfunction. Officers on patrol order several female nude sunbathers to cover up.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A woman tells officers she’s a vampire. Officers question a colorful man dressed as a woman. A violent woman screams obscenities at officers and needs to be restrained.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Several squad cars join together in pursuit of a pickup truck. Officers conduct a drug raid utilizing percussion grenades. A suspect wanted for numerous robberies flees from police in a sports car.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An officer shows up as Coco the Clown in an undercover sting. The Vice unit conducts a reverse-prostitution sting designed to capture suspected “johns.”

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A remorseful woman is arrested for lewd conduct during Mardi Gras. Police officers are dispatched into the busy streets of New Orleans during the super bowl in search of ticket scalpers. Police Department investigates a theft at a local store.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and Catherine investigate the stabbing death of an 80-year-old woman who lived in a run-down house full of cats.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and Sara investigate when a man's body, which has been doused with lye, is found buried in a park.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and his crew handle their highest profile case to date when the city's former chief of detectives is slain execution-style in his house following a wild party.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSIs investigate when the body of an unidentified young woman is discovered stuffed in an overturned shopping cart near a freeway underpass.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Catherine and Nick investigate street racing after one of the drivers is found dead out in the desert at an abandoned airstrip.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and his team investigate a crime involving a popular actor.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and Catherine investigate the murder of a wealthy couple who are found outside their home, which was up for sale.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom suspects murder when the body of a dwarf is found hanging from a rope high above a stage in a casino hotel where a convention of little people is being held.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom, Warrick, and Sara investigate when a woman vanishes while taking part in a magician's act.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Fifteen years ago, Catherine helped put a man on death row for the rape and murder of a coed at a nearby college. The man is about to be executed when he's granted a stay based on new DNA evidence.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A boxing champ dies in the ring after taking a brutal beating from his nemesis, but Grissom finds evidence that points to murder.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Catherine is called in by a pornographic-film developer to view graphic footage from a snuff movie in which a woman is brutally slain.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A cab driver seems to run over a boy and is then beaten to death by a mob for racial reasons.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom, Warrick, and Nick investigate the case of a man who apparently was murdered and pushed off a six-story building.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Una bomba explota en un edificio de oficinas matando a una persona e hiriendo a muchas más. El principal sospechoso es un guardia de seguridad que se marchó minutos antes de la explosión y que tiene conocimiento en la fabricación de bombas.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando se descubre un único hueso humano en el desierto, Grissom y Catherine deben recorrer kilómetros de territorio para encontrar el resto del esqueleto.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: En una elegante recaudación de fondos, a la que asiste el sheriff, una mujer aparece muerta en la piscina.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Una mujer es secuestrada en el aparcamiento de un centro comercial. Es violada, golpeada, disparada y dada por muerta. Sara recoge pruebas de ella y se encariña con ella.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Encuentran un cadáver en una tienda de cerámica en lo que parece ser un robo interrumpido.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Una pareja que sale de un restaurante en su aniversario es asesinada en la calle y su coche es robado. La escena del crimen se ve comprometida cuando llueve poco después de que lleguen los CSI.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Todo el equipo investiga el secuestro del hijo pequeño de una familia acomodada. Las sospechas recaen inmediatamente sobre los padres del niño.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Dos adolescentes atropellan con su coche a un sordo, pero no lo matan: ya estaba muerto.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom, Nick y Warrick toman el caso de un corredor que fue asesinado por un animal salvaje en el parque. La cosa se complica cuando descubren que al corredor le extirparon el hígado después de matarlo.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El día que Grissom tiene que evaluar a su equipo, se encuentra una cabeza en el maletero de un coche. Mientras Gil y Catherine trabajan en la cabeza, Sara y Nick investigan un cadáver en el desierto al que le falta la cabeza.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo investiga los continuos asesinatos cometidos por un asesino de firma. El asesino tiene ciertos conocimientos forenses y ha dejado pocas pruebas.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom y su equipo son llamados después de que Tony Braun, un conocido drogadicto, es encontrado muerto en su casa por un jardinero.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Todo el equipo de CSI investiga una desaparición en una universidad local.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom investiga un posible suicidio en una obra de gran envergadura.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A kidnapping case becomes personal for Horatio and the CSI team when the victim unexpectedly turns out to be Boa Vista's sister.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a man is decapitated while doing a daring stunt with his car, the team suspects that it was more than just an accident.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio uncovers a deadly plot against the City of Miami after a young woman is murdered at a charity event. He and the CSI team investigate.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a Marine recruiter is murdered, the CSIs must delve into the world of enlisting soldiers and the families they leave behind.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Sonya Barak is standing trial for aiding in a plot to destroy Miami when her own people try to gun her down. Horatio and the CSI team investigate.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When Natalia's ex-husband is murdered, evidence suggests that she killed him. Many people had a motive to kill Nick. Horatio and the CSIs investigate.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Det. Frank Tripp's life hangs in the balance when he steps on a land mine while investigating a crime scene. Horatio and the CSI team investigate.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a truck full of confiscated weapons is hijacked and the weapons are released back into the public, Horatio links the crime to Clavo Cruz.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A member of the team is pronounced dead after being shot in the head. Not wanting to give up, Horatio has the CSI rushed to the hospital.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio and the CSI team must investigate when the parents of a baby sitter in an upscale neighborhood are brutally murdered.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A hunting weekend turns deadly when someone in the group is mauled by a bear and evidence suggests foul play. Horatio and the CSI team investigate.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a wealthy real estate developer is killed, Horatio and the CSI team suspect his wife and her two secret twin sisters.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio suspects that the County Supervisor and the owners of a nearby Native American Casino may be involved when a murder victim is found scalped.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio and the team investigate a movie star's death while he was in a celebrity rehab center and on the verge of exposing some damaging secrets.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando el equipo de CSI encuentra a una universitaria muerta en un jacuzzi, investiga un caso marcado por celos, psicosis y compañeros de cuarto de la universidad.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando Horatio Caine persigue a un misterioso sospechoso de asesinato, descubre que toda la vida del hombre es una elaborada farsa.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Después de que Horatio captura al último fugitivo de la cárcel, su avión de transporte realiza un aterrizaje forzoso y se descubre que el fugitivo tiene planeado algo más que una fuga.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Las vidas de Horatio y Natalia penden de un hilo mientras Horatio se interpone entre Natalia y una muerte segura.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Tieso (S10 Ep2)
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI se adentra en el mundo sexy de los gigolós cuando descubren un arma homicida poco común.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Un tornado pasa por encima de una escena de un crimen, daña la evidencia y pone a Ryan y Walter en grave peligro.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: El equipo persigue a un asesino sádico que les quita los ojos a las mujeres y un nuevo archienemigo desafía a Horatio.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio protege a una jefa de la policía mexicana del misterioso asesino que mató a su esposo.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: En una mansión desierta, el equipo de CSI encuentra un cuerpo colgando que parece haber sido asesinado por un vampiro.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Un asesino enmascarado interrumpe un juego de póquer de altas apuestas y deja a un jugador muerto y desconcertado al equipo de CSI.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando Horatio encuentra otro cadáver al que le faltan los ojos, todo apunta a su archienemigo, el Atormentador, pero él tiene una coartada irrefutable.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI investiga cuando tres asesinos condenados salen de la cárcel y alguien comienza a matarlos uno por uno.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando una familia entera desaparece sin dejar rastro, Horatio jura encontrarlos, vivos o muertos.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI expone la parte más sórdida de los concursos de belleza de niñas cuando la madre de una concursante es asesinada.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When a powerful gang leader is murdered, the CSI New York team of investigators must find the killer before a street war breaks out.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A jewel heist at the penthouse of one of New York's most powerful attorneys takes a bizarre turn as the case leads the CSIs to a man in the morgue.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The CSI New York team of investigators finds a body on a rooftop and must find the killer who is manipulating crime scenes.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: With a sniper lose in New York City, Mac must relive an abduction case that might have created one of the city's deadliest foes.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The CSI New York team of investigators experience eerie occurrences after a woman is found who has literally been scared to death.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Mac goes up against the deputy chief of detectives when a dark secret from the chief's past threatens his reputation and family.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Mac and the CSI New York team search for the killer of a department store manager found dead in a holiday display window.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When a man in full clown costume shoots a bakery owner, the CSIs investigate and discover a decision from Flack's past that may put him in jeopardy.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When a Spanish club promoter is found dead, Detective Mac Taylor must battle with the head of Barcelona's crime lab to solve the case.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When a tractor-trailer carrying party guests mysteriously ends up at the bottom of the Hudson River, the CSIs must exhume the soggy remains.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When the CSIs track down a suave and charming hitman, their investigation uncovers a conspiracy with far-reaching implications.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When a serial rapist is murdered, restrained in the same manner as his victims, the CSIs weigh a feeling of justice against their sense of duty.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When a conspiracy-obsessed woman is found dead, the CSIs investigate and discover that some of her theories may have had some truth to them.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When a popular student at Manhattan's most elite private school is murdered, the CSIs find themselves in the competitive world of the overprivileged.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Amor sanguíneo (S6 Ep 14)
programme.desc: Cuando encuentran a una mujer joven muerta en el Central Park, el equipo de CSI de Nueva York es atraído hacia la misteriosa subcultura del vampirismo.

programme.title: CSI: New York: La fórmula (S6 Ep 15)
programme.desc: Cuando una leyenda de las carreras de autos muere en una feroz explosión, el equipo de CSI de Nueva York descubre que la causa es una alteración en el auto.

programme.title: CSI: New York: El reinando de la incertidumbre (S6 Ep16)
programme.desc: Cuando encuentran a cuatro víctimas muertas en una habitación de hotel y el principal sospechoso aparece empuñando un hacha, el equipo de CSI intenta reconstruir los detalles.

programme.title: CSI: New York: La olla de oro (S6 Ep 17)
programme.desc: Cuando encuentran a dos jóvenes periodistas muertos en la víspera del Día de San Patricio, el equipo de CSI intenta encontrar la pista al final del arco iris.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Descansa en paz, Marina Garito (S6 Ep18)
programme.desc: Cuando encuentran muerta a una mujer, la evidencia y la autopsia sugieren suicidio, pero Stella no está convencida y arriesga su vida para continuar con el caso.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Redención (S6 Ep19)
programme.desc: El último pedido de un condenado a muerte lleva a Hawkes a una cárcel de Pensilvania y se enfrenta a un secreto personal justo cuando estalla un motín en la prisión.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Sospechosos inesperados (S6 Ep20)
programme.desc: El asesinato a tiros de un chico de 14 años frente a su hermano de 12 años lleva el deseo de justicia del detective Mac Taylor a otro nivel.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Desde el subsuelo (S6 Ep21)
programme.desc: Cuando una losa de concreto comienza a chorrear sangre en el centro de la ciudad, la investigación del equipo de CSI los lleva a un mundo clandestino de peleas brutales.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Punto de vista (S6 Ep22)
programme.desc: Después de ser herido, Mac observa a sus vecinos mientras se recupera y es testigo de una actividad misteriosa que conduce a asesinato.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Escapada en vacaciones (S6 Ep23)
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI de Nueva York sigue un rastro que dejó Shane Casey y se da cuenta de que por venganza, él tiene en la mira a Danny, que está de vacaciones.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Piso 34 (S7 Ep1)
programme.desc: El miembro más nuevo del equipo de CSI de Nueva York, como bienvenida, se topa con una mujer asesinada en el edificio del laboratorio de criminalística de la policía de Nueva York.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Plática poco amigable (S7 Ep2)

programme.title: Acá las tortas (Los hijos de los ricos)

programme.title: Terremoto en Guatemala
programme.desc: Tras el devastador terremoto de 1976 en Guatemala (7.6 Richter), se destaca la historia de amor y sacrificio de una pareja recién casada, víctimas del desastre. Un relato conmovedor sobre la fuerza del compromiso en medio de la tragedia.

programme.title: Después de la tormenta
programme.desc: Rosa y su marido, Melchor, trabajan como encargados del faro en la Isla de Lobos. Cuando Melchor sale a navegar junto a su gemelo durante una tormenta, solo un hermano regresa, afirmando que es Rafael.

programme.desc: Burl Ives earned a Best Supporting Actor Oscar for his portrayal of a family patriarch involved in a bitter land feud in this explosive western drama that also features a sumptuous musical score.

programme.desc: Clint Eastwood stars in this brazen tale about a rampaging band of vigilantes who make two mistakes: they hang the wrong man and they don't finish the job. Inger Stevens, Pat Hingle, Bruce Dern & Dennis Hopper co-star in this action-packed western.

programme.title: The Magnificent Seven (1960)
programme.desc: Yul Brynner stars as one of seven gunslingers pitted against an army of marauding bandits in this rousing classic that made stars of Steve McQueen, Charles Bronson, and James Coburn. Eli Wallach also stars in this timeless tale of good versus evil.

programme.title: The Russians Are Coming, The Russians Are Coming
programme.desc: Alan Arkin and Jonathan Winters lead an all-star cast (Carl Reiner, Eva Marie Saint, Brian Keith, Theodore Bikel) in this outrageous comedy about a Russian submarine that runs aground off the New England coast.

programme.title: Brannigan
programme.desc: John Wayne stars as Chicago Police Lieutenant Jim Brannigan and Richard Attenborough co-stars as British policeman Cmdr. Swann in this action-comedy. Brannigan teams up in the U.K. with Cmdr Swann to escort a crime boss back to the U.S.

programme.title: Island In The Sky
programme.desc: Set after World War II, John Wayne plays Dooley, a former army pilot flying transport missions, who is forced to crash-land his fuel-starved plane on a frozen lake after it strays from its course.

programme.title: The Maury Show

programme.title: The Maury Show

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: El cuerpo de Leanne Tiernan, de 16 años, fue descubierto nueve meses después de su desaparición. Los científicos forenses encontraron pistas que pintaron un retrato virtual de su asesino.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Jardín del mal
programme.desc: Cuando un popular disc jockey fue encontrado asesinado en un jardín comunitario, la policía entró en acción.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: El mundo es un escenario
programme.desc: La policía es enviada a la escena de un tiroteo y descubren que el esposo de la víctima es uno de los suyos: un detective de homicidios que dice que su esposa se disparó accidentalmente en la cabeza.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un estudiante de posgrado de la Universidad Estatal de Michigan desapareció y se presumió muerto. Con la ayuda de un profesor de ciencias geológicas, la policía esperaba obtener información de su asesino.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Pura suerte
programme.desc: En 1991, la esposa de un militar fue brutalmente asesinada en Filipinas.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Dos hombres diferentes llamaron a la policía para denunciar el mismo asesinato. Al parecer, ninguno sabía que el otro había llamado. La investigación descubrió circunstancias aún más inusuales.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Evidencia del Jefe
programme.desc: Se detalla el asesinato en Seattle de 1996 de la pareja suburbana Raquel Rivera y Jay Johnson. La evidencia del perro, Chief, de la pareja finalmente vincula a uno de los asesinos a la escena.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando el número y volumen de manchas de sangre es mayor que la habitual en la escena del crimen, es el trabajo de los científicos forenses el determinar el por qué.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1989, April Loveless, de 4 años, fue encontrada muerta en el patio trasero de su casa en Texas. Sus padres le dijeron a la policía que fue atacada y asesinada por perros salvajes. Los investigadores no estuvieron de acuerdo.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Rompiendo el Molde
programme.desc: El hijo de tres años de unos padres de Dripping Springs, Texas, desarrolla una condición respiratoria.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Suela reveladora
programme.desc: Armada con solo eso, la policía esperaba que las huellas de zapatos encontradas en la escena del crimen de Michigan, volvieran a encarrilar su investigación sobre el asesinato de Audrey Nichols.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una fría noche de Diciembre de 1993, Rose Larner se detuvo en una tienda cuando se dirigía a la casa de su novio. Nunca más se la vio ni se supo de ella.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un asesino en serie andaba suelto y la policía tenía que encontrarlo antes de que atacara nuevamente. Su pista más prometedora era inusual: una huella dactilar sangrienta en el cuerpo de una de las víctimas.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En la escena de un asesinato horrible, el asesino se esforzó mucho para poder borrar sus huellas dactilares y oscurecer las huellas de zapatos que dejó cuando arrastraba los rastros de sangre en el piso.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La escena del crimen estaba inundada de sangre, lo que hablaba del horror del crimen: el asesinato de dos niños pequeños y el apuñalamiento de su madre.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Encontrar al sospechoso
programme.desc: Los atentados con bombas son difíciles de resolver, porque el perpetrador no suele estar en la escena y la evidencia se esfuma.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 2006, Kathy Augustine, una política de Nevada, murió misteriosamente durante una campaña de reelección. El médico forense no pudo aislar la causa de la muerte ni explicar las pequeñas heridas punzantes descubiertas durante la autopsia.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Trago de pecados
programme.desc: Una mirada retrospectiva a un trío de asesinatos sin resolver que ocurrieron en Wichita Falls, Texas durante la década de 1980, detalla cómo un cuarto asesinato durante el mismo período le proporcionó a la policía más de lo que se dieron cuenta.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En este episodio clásico de Archivos Forenses la serie de crímenes reales más extensa de la historia de la televisión, Eileen y Derrick Severs desaparecen de su casa en un pequeño pueblo de Gran Bretaña y la policía encuentra evidencia de un crimen.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una mujer de 19 años fue encontrada muerta en su automóvil; la escena se había organizado para que el asesinato pareciera un suicidio.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: El pensamiento rápido de un investigador lo ayuda a capturar una huella de zapato hecha en la nieve antes de que la evidencia se desvanezca.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando una mujer desaparecía sin dejar rastro, había dos posibles explicaciones: secuestro o asesinato.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Voto de silencio
programme.desc: Una mirada al caso contra Jack Reeves. Unos amigos informaron que su novia por correo había desaparecido. La policía centró sus sospechas en Reeves y, mientras buscaba pistas, descubrió información que lo vinculaba con la muerte de dos ex esposas.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Los investigadores examinan las cenizas de un incendio que mató a una mujer de 40 años. El fuego parecía haber sido iniciado por un cigarrillo desatendido.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1995, la policía de San Diego está desconcertada por un par de manos encontradas en un contenedor de basura. A través de una investigación adicional, determinan que las manos son las de la persona desaparecida Don Hardin.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Placas y mentiras
programme.desc: Un estudiante universitario fue encontrado muerto y la evidencia sugirió que conocía a su asesino.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1994, Shannon Melendi, de 19 años, desapareció mientras estaba en la Universidad de Emory. Su desaparición permaneció un misterio durante diez años, hasta que una nueva prueba científica proporcionó una nueva pista sobre Colvin "Butch" Hinton.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The hopefuls practice the highly precise entrance routine and jump kicks for the first time, Jordann shares a vulnerable personal story, and Judy and Kelli make two more tough cuts.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: As the remaining ladies try out for the media-savvy Show Group, Judy and Kelli are faced with yet another difficult decision, and some dancers rise to glory while others' hearts are broken.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Makeovers give the dancers renewed confidence, alum Yuko shares exciting personal news, veteran Lisa makes a hard decision, and Kelli questions Alora-Rose about a rumored distraction.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Week nine of training camp intensifies when Kelli and Judy confront Alora-Rose and deliberate squad dismissal decisions one week before the first game of the season.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Kelli and Judy slyly make the final squad announcement, and the new team faces several obstacles before taking the field for their first game as Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Hundreds will audition but only 45 girls will secure a spot in the Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders training camp. DCC director Kelli Finglass presides over the process with a keen eye for talent and beauty.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Training camp gets underway as the girls are introduced to a grueling schedule of dance rehearsals with choreographer Judy Trammell and fitness instructor Jay Johnson.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Reality sets in and the mental and physical stress of training camp hits the girls hard.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Super Bowl XXX MVP Larry Brown and current Dallas Cowboy Ryan Fowler school the training camp candidates with the ultimate football challenge. The girls are tested on their NFL knowledge and athletic skills on the field.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Beauty is the name of the game as the training camp candidates get major hair makeovers in preparation for their first solo publicity stills. But not everyone is picture perfect and by the end of the week, there will be a heartbreaking elimination.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The end of training camp is just around the corner and after Kelli's annual etiquette luncheon the girls are on their best behavior. A tough new choreographer introduces the girls to real dance technique with devastating results.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The candidates find themselves in front of the camera for a crash course in how to deal with the media. The judges from the open call are brought back to have their final say.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The summer is coming to a close, and there are now 36 girls poised to become America's sweethearts. Kelli and Judy are concerned the team is not ready and there may have to be more cuts.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Hundreds of excited and anxious Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders hopefuls arrive at Texas Stadium for the preliminary auditions. After performing their freestyle dance routines for the judges, only half make it to the semi-finals.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: In the final audition, the competition really heats up. Now, surviving candidates must go head-to-head against experienced veteran cheerleaders for a coveted spot in the DCC Training Camp.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Making it this far is one thing - enduring Training Camp is another. The hopeful group of 43 is far from the final squad, and DCC Director Kelli Finglass quickly reminds them that there will be cuts.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Only two weeks into training camp, it's time to start making cuts. While "veteran" cheerleaders model bikinis for their upcoming calendar shoot, anxious training camp "rookies" dance their hearts out to prove to Kelli and Judy that they deserve to stay.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: After saying goodbye to one of their own, reality sets in for the remaining training camp candidates: nobody's position on the squad is secure. The girls are fitted for the revealing DCC uniforms, then sweat their way through a punishing physical workout

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The training camp candidates don't know what hit them when tough as nails and brutally honest guest choreographer Kitty Carter teaches a class. Then, the rookies get one step closer to transforming into Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The rookies get to wear the iconic Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders uniform for the very first time during a professional modeling shoot. Then the girls have a life-changing experience skydiving with the legendary Army parachute team, the Golden Knights!

programme.title: Double Shot at Love with DJ Pauly D & Vinny
programme.desc: Pauly and Vinny face off for the chance at a one-on-one date with a single, and emotions run high throughout the house when Nikki starts a rumor.

programme.title: Double Shot at Love with DJ Pauly D & Vinny
programme.desc: Pauly and Vinny face off in a Double Shot debate, the singles vote for superlatives in the house, and Nikki shows the guys a different side of herself.

programme.title: Double Shot at Love with DJ Pauly D & Vinny
programme.desc: Coming in hot with her aggressive, confrontational approach, Pauly and Vinny's Jersey Shore roommate Angelina drops in to sort out which ladies are there for the right reason.

programme.title: Double Shot at Love with DJ Pauly D & Vinny
programme.desc: Pauly and Vinny's bromance hits a rough patch when they both fall for the same woman, and drama erupts in the house when Nikki's jealousy rubs the other ladies the wrong way.

programme.title: Double Shot at Love with DJ Pauly D & Vinny
programme.desc: The ladies confront their relationship baggage, test out their maternal instincts during a day with Pauly's 'daughter' and pack for a trip on a private jet with the guys.

programme.title: Double Shot at Love with DJ Pauly D & Vinny
programme.desc: After Pauly takes the ladies to Houston to get a taste of his DJ lifestyle, Vinny takes them to Staten Island to get grilled by his Jersey Shore roommate Nicole.

programme.title: Double Shot at Love with DJ Pauly D & Vinny
programme.desc: Pauly and Vinny see a different side of the women when the singles' friends and family members visit the house, and Ronnie and Jenni drop by and bring a surprise with them.

programme.title: Double Shot at Love with DJ Pauly D & Vinny
programme.desc: The truth comes out when Jersey Shore's Jenni and Ronnie subject the singles to a lie detector test, and Pauly and Vinny go on their final one-on-one dates.

programme.title: Double Shot at Love with DJ Pauly D & Vinny
programme.desc: Before the final Cab Ceremony, Pauly and Vinny's moms drop by to meet the remaining ladies, and the guys decide who they want to ask for a shot at love.

programme.title: Wife Swap Australia
programme.desc: Elle is a glamorous Gold Coast Mum who's obsessed with fashion, makeup, and taking selfies. Sheree and Dave are simple, salt of the earth country Queenslanders.

programme.title: Wife Swap Australia
programme.desc: 11 children, three bedrooms, one bathroom and not much money to get by. The Lange household is truly packed to the rafters. Strict Mum Leanne truly believes she could be Australia's best Mum.

programme.title: Wife Swap Australia
programme.desc: Ash and James are the true definition of city living, millennial parents -online-obsessed, technology-obsessed. The Hagar family are slow-paced, old fashioned, off the grid organic farmers

programme.title: Wife Swap Australia
programme.desc: Penina's sole focus in life is to save money and pay off the mortgage. Kellie and Brendon prioritise fun family experiences over anything and everything.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: When Zoë lands her dream role, it hits a little too close to home following her assault. Clare has some tough decisions to make as she searches for a date to Wild Wild West Night. Miles focuses on settling the score with Zig.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Fireworks begin at Wild Wild West Night when Clare makes her decision known with regards to Drew and Eli. Zoë struggles to stand up for herself. Miles and Zig face off in a showdown for Maya's heart.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Maya is doing her best to keep Zig safe but when she snoops and finds a bag of drugs, her worst fears are confirmed. Winston is on the prowl for his first ladyfriend when he realizes the perfect girl has been right under his nose for years.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Hiding Zig out at the Matlin house while the Maya organizes the Art Night seems to be working… for now. But will she be able to keep the gang away? Clare is deparate for answers from Drew.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Becky feels isolated at home since helping turn in her brother. Looking for a distraction, she finds her escape in online gaming. Drew’s excited for the last days of the Hollingsworth campaign but his charm gets him more than he bargained for.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Drew is in trouble! He was fired from the campaign, his friends think he’s a home-wrecker, and he’s even in a fight with Dallas.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: When Tristan asks Mr. Yates for some writing help for his MC gig, Mr. Yates suggests he come to his apartment for some extra help. Imogen crushes hard on Jack and is determined to prove she can “roll” with her crowd.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Tristan is warned by Mr. Yates to make his feelings about their affair less obvious at school but Tristan can’t help it, he’s beaming.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Zoë's trial begins and when she fears that she is being painted in a harsh light, she takes matters into her own hands. Becky is torn up about what she’s going to say when she takes the stand as a character witness in her brother’s trial.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The media is abuzz about Zoë’s trial. Feeling hopeless and worried about her tarnished reputation, Zoë is nervous as the verdict approaches. Becky is torn about what to say in her testimony, but deep down knows what she has to do.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Will a superstorm headed for Toronto stall a Degrassi dance? Maya, Zig & Zoë plan to attend but get stranded at the Matlin house.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Clare is forced to spend the night with Eli while in New York City. Maya and Zoë seek refuge in The Dot with nothing to do but sort out their rivalry. Drew searches for missing Becky. Miles and Tristan share a bonding moment during the storm.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Clare has a serious dilemma that will affect her entire future and confides in Alli and Jenna.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Drew's not taking the easy way out - he's going to be part of his child's life, whether Clare wants it or not.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Frankie isn't a little girl anymore!

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Clare has to muster up the courage to tell Eli about her situation.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Becky and her brother Luke’s relationship is very strained and even with her faith as strong as it is, she can't bring herself to forgive him.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Maya can’t sleep. She’s having nightmares about Miles’ safety, and they’re becoming all too familiar.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Zoë receives texts from an unknown number, threatening that they know the people behind the Power Squad’s scandalous fundraising initiative.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Tristan organizes an intervention for Miles, but it only pushes him further away.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Drew is committed to keeping Becky happy but his situation with Clare has his attention divided.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Mr. Simpson calls an assembly to address the offending fundraising website.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Degrassi's fundraising scandal threatens to ruin Frankie's relationship with her father.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Mr. Hollingsworth’s campaign is in its final stretch, and the stress has him even more tense than usual.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Degrassi is now in the hands of a new, strict Administrator which means new, strict rules.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Winston is set to play the lead in his musical but is not pleased that Lola could star opposite him.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: It’s Frankie’s birthday, and she’s going to celebrate it, Hollingsworth style -- with a Gatsby party!

programme.title: The Truth About Killer Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Bird expert Bill Oddie helps construct amazing, life-sized, bio-mechanical replicas as he presents an imaginary battle between a tyrannosaurus rex and a triceratops.

programme.title: The Truth About Killer Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Here, Bill Oddie asks whether the Velociraptor was really the monstrous predator of popular legend.

programme.title: Prehistoric Autopsy
programme.desc: Anatomist Professor Alice Roberts and biologist Dr George McGavin go on an extraordinary evolutionary journey to meet our ancient ancestors. They start with our closest prehistoric relative, a Neanderthal.

programme.title: Prehistoric Autopsy
programme.desc: The team go back 1.5 million years to meet one of the earliest humans, Homo erectus. They walked the earth far longer than any other human species and were the first ancestors to look a lot like we do today.

programme.title: Prehistoric Autopsy
programme.desc: The team looks at probably the most famous of all our early ancestors. She is called Lucy from the species Australopithecus afarensis and she lived 3.2 million years ago. Lucy's species had traded life in the trees for life on the ground.

programme.title: Ice Age Giants
programme.desc: Discover the beasts of the Ice Age with Professor Alice Roberts. Alice's adventure begins in the Land of the Sabre-tooth.

programme.title: Ice Age Giants
programme.desc: Alice ventures to the parts of the northern hemisphere hit hardest by the cold - Europe and Siberia. High in the mountains of Transylvania, a cave sealed for thousands of years reveals grisly evidence of a fight to the death.

programme.title: Ice Age Giants
programme.desc: Professor Alice Roberts journeys 40,000 years back in time on the trail of the great beasts of the ice age. This was the last time that giants like mammoths, woolly rhinos and sabre-toothed cats ruled our planet.

programme.title: Living with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: David Attenborough learns that descendants of the dinosaur age are alive and well. David explores how they survived the catastrophes that wiped out other species.

programme.title: The Lost World
programme.desc: Professor Challenger leads a party of explorers from the smog of Edwardian London to South America in search of a mythical plateau rumoured to be inhabited by dinosaurs.

programme.title: The Lost World
programme.desc: Professor Challenger leads a party of explorers from the smog of Edwardian London to South America in search of a mythical plateau rumoured to be inhabited by dinosaurs.

programme.title: Deadly Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Steve is going large as he focuses on the biggest animals to have ever walked the earth. In his dino-den, he starts by meeting the Argentinosaurus, an animal so large that even its poo was deadly.

programme.title: Deadly Dinosaurs
programme.desc: The Jurassic was home to the most vicious and violent predators the world has ever seen. To survive, herbivores had to fight back. Steve Backshall goes on a mission to track down the deadliest of all dinosaur defenders.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Doctor and Jo discover the mine's terrible secret.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Brigadier attempts to seal the giant maggots in the mine with explosives.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: Captain Mike Yates is taken over by the super computer.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
